programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Boneless pork chops are lean and quick-cooking, making them ideal for weeknight meals. Pork tenderloin, which is also lean, has a somewhat fussy reputation, but you don't need to be a professional chef to cook tenderloin properly.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We make a fresh-tasting, quick tamale pie with a juicy, spicy mixture of meat and vegetables and a quick homemade-cornbread topping. We also show you how to cook up a really flavorful chicken stew topped with a biscuit crust.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Whether we admit it or not, there are some dishes that are a little too high in fat and calories to be enjoyed on a regular basis. Even a modest portion of macaroni and cheese or chicken Parmesan is prohibitive. But that doesn't need to be the case.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to be able to serve English-style fish and chips—large pieces of moist and delicate cod in a crisp and tender coating with thick-cut fries—at home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Commonly found at catered events, this once-highbrow dish has become a bit of a joke. But after preparing several cookbook versions, we realized that pairing a crisp-fried coating with a delicate butter sauce was a great idea that deserved a revival.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: While the hallmark of this filet mignon is its tender texture, some argue that the beefy flavor is too mild, lacking the oomph of fattier cuts like rib eye. So we aim to boost the filet mignon's flavor with a peppercorn crust and a rich pan sauce.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Ashley shows Bridget how to make a Crumb-Crusted Rack of Lamb that is perfect for the holidays. Next, Adam shows Julia his top picks of electric knives. Finally, Christie shows Julia how to make a showstopping Brussels Sprout Gratin.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan and Julia team up to make a New Orleans classic, Shrimp Po’ Boys. Then, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of a Mardi Gras favorite, king cakes. Finally, Ashley and Bridget make a Cajun specialty, Chicken Sauce Piquant.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie and Bridget uncover the secrets to making a flavorful Double-Crust Chicken Pot Pie from scratch. Next, Jack challenges Julia to a tasting of creamy peanut butter. Finally, Ashley makes Julia a delicious First Lady specialty, Cowboy Cookies.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan Roof makes host Julia Collin Davison Monterey Bay Cioppino. Equipment expert Adam Ried reveals his top pick for can openers. Morgan Bolling makes host Bridget Lancaster Shrimp Mozambique.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Lawman Johnson makes host Julia Collin Davison Grilled Flank Steak with Basil Dressing. Equipment expert Adam Ried reveals his top pick for herb keepers. Christie Morrison makes host Bridget Lancaster Fresh Tomato Galette.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie Morrison makes host Bridget Lancaster Shashlik-Style Beef Kebabs. Tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges Bridget to a tasting of ground cumin. Bryan Roof makes host Julia Collin Davison Adjaruli Khachapuri.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We love a good stir-fry served with rice, but a noodle cake, a savory round of tender noodles sautéed in a skillet until the exterior is crisp, is also a great base for a saucy stir-fry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We prepare a Thai-inspired beef stir-fry and share a recipe for great potstickers.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We create tasty versions of two Tex-Mex favorites: chicken fajitas and huevos rancheros.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Fifty years ago, steak Diane was prepared tableside and included a burst of pyrotechnics supplied by a match and some cognac. Sure, such theatrics might seem a bit dated and silly, but they are essential to the flavor of the dish. We explain why.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we show you how the strangest-sounding methods can sometimes be the most rewarding and how a few easy tricks can give an old standby, like roast chicken, a new lift.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: If the weather is too poor for grilling and a hankering for ribs strikes, is the only choice a trip to a local barbecue joint? Or could we find the answer in the home kitchen?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.desc: A 40-year-old dive bar in California is on the brink of collapse, and Jon must decide if the owner should stay in charge as manager or cede power to his daughter.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is from Verona, New York with a Middleweight showdown as Chidi Njokuani takes on former champ Andrey Koreshkov. Heavy-handed Brennan Ward will face off against Fernando Gonzalez in the co-main slot.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes home to San Jose, California with a collision between top lightweights as Patricky Pitbull meets Benson Henderson. Plus the Bellator debut of Roy “Big Country” Nelson when he faces hard-hitting Javy Ayala in a heavyweight battle.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville as Eduardo Dantas puts his Bantamweight world title on the line against Darrion Caldwell. This stacked fight card also features Daniel Straus taking on Emmanuel Sanchez and Pat Curran facing off against John Macapa.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The elite two-division threat, Gegard Mousasi makes his Bellator debut against former Middleweight Champion Alexander Shlemenko who is on a five-fight win streak.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Penn State as accomplished alumni Phil Davis and Ed Ruth return to their roots. Light Heavyweight Champ Ryan Bader defends his belt. Plus Ilima-Lei Macfarlane and Emily Ducote clash for the inaugural flyweight world title!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Dublin as Irish fan-favorite Brian Moore meets undefeated rising sensation, AJ McKee. Baby Slice returns to the cage, and Conor McGregor’s training partner Charlie Ward battles John Redmond in a fight sure to provide fireworks!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator is back with featherweight action as world champion Julia Budd puts her title on the line in a grudge rematch against Australian Arlene Blencowe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Italy with a huge middleweight world title fight. Local hero Alessio Sakara will have the crowd on his side as he looks to dethrone current champion Rafael Carvalho, who comes in riding a six fight Bellator win streak of his own.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator brings the fight action from Newcastle, UK, as two newly inked superstars make their Bellator debuts. Both Valérie Létourneau and Michael McDonald will look for statement wins in the Bellator cage as they aim to send a message to their rivals.

programme.title: Bellator 192: Rampage vs Sonnen
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes over The Forum with a highly anticipated showdown between “The American Gangster” Chael Sonnen and Rampage Jackson. Also, Douglas Lima and Rory MacDonald clash for the welterweight belt and Michael Chandler collides with Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Caylee Anthony's mom, Casey Anthony, has been named a person of interest in the case of the missing 3-year-old. Many fear the worst has happened. Dr. Phil examines the psychological aspects of the story that continues to grip America's imagination.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer claims her family has been the victim of hackers for 2 years. The problem is her husband, Billy, thinks she is the hacker! Things are so bad that Billy has asked for a divorce. Jennifer says she wants to clear her name & save her marriage! Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2011, Morgan, 20, was found dead, a suspected overdose with a later ruling of death by suicide. Parents Toni & Steve believe something more sinister: she was stalked, tormented & killed by Brooke, 18, who joins the show with her dad, Jim.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Alethea feels trapped in a rage-filled relationship with her partner Kevin. She says "The Hulk," also known as "Kevin's anger," is so off the charts, even strangers call police. Kevin says his rage is a result of brain trauma. See MRI brain scan results.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Leah says mom Dora appears sweet but she's actually a narcissist, hypochondriac, drama queen & liar. Can this mother-daughter find common ground and rebuild? Plus Carrie says mom Paula, 61, has been meeting strangers online having sex. Dr. Phil weighs in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil conducts an emotionally-charged intervention with Bobbi Kristina Brown's boyfriend, Nick Gordon, who is battling drug & alcohol addiction and struggling to come to terms with Bobbi's near-drowning & Whitney Houston's death. Will Nick accept help?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Blake, 26, is a college graduate and on the dean's list with a 3.5 GPA. He has thrown it away to sit around and smoke pot in the rent-free house his mom supplied. He has aspirations, like stripping off his shirt to show off his self-professed buff body.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In one of the most twisted & bizarre love deceptions ever on Dr. Phil, 7 female college students from Brigham Young University face the man they say they fell in love with online but never met in person. Don't miss the surprising twist in this story!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ben says his wife, Kelly gained a significant amount of weight, is no longer affectionate & stopped cleaning & cooking his favorite meals 6 mos after marrying. Kelly says Ben lost 100 lbs, then became a "narcissist" & a "jerk" Can this marriage be saved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What happens when a parent's agenda becomes so extreme that his or her children are forced to live a harsh, stoic existence?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Renee & Lee insist their little granddaughter is not safe in the care of her parents because they are severe alcoholics. Chris & Jessica admit to alcoholism yet insist they are great parents. Dr. Phil shows shocking footage of what home cameras captured.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil's guests say they endure abuse from their grown children. Debbie says daughter, Amy, 31, is verbally & physically abusive. Amy admits she can be cruel to her mom, but Debbie makes her feel like a failure. As tempers flare see who storms off!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Terrie says daughter Kelly accused her of molesting her 5-yr-old granddaughter. Terrie says Kelly attended a week-long desert retreat that affected her personality: Kelly says she saw aliens on the retreat who may have abducted, raped & impregnated her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kaye, 70, says she has sent over $200,000 to "Aaron," a man she met on the Internet & has been "dating" for over a year, but never met in person. Tensions flare when the women come face-to-face on Dr. Phil's stage. And who is "Aaron?" Pt. 1

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts still don't realize that Mr. Pinckney is their butler instead of their boarder. When he tries to leave them Granny thinks he trying to skip without paying his rent.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May goes to Jed's studio to be in a movie and meet a potential husband.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Ellie May loses another suitor to Miss Jane in another case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts accidentally run into a beatnik he moves into the Clampett mansion, but neither he nor they know what to make of each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: As a favor to Jed Mr. Drysdale arranges for a playboy bank director (who normally only dates women half his age) to come court Granny, while Jed goes out with a beautiful woman who dates rich older men.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants Jed to find a wife and asks for Mr. Drysdale's help. He introduces Jed to Phyllis but learns too late she a gold digger and becomes alarmed when they head to the track. But it's Granny they need to worry about.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's biggest rival John Cushing succeeds in getting the Clampetts to transfer all of their money to his bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drydale's poodle Claude is to enter a dog show but gets sick right before. Granny offers to doctor the dog but Ellie Mae is concerned he doesn't know any tricks so she decides to help out with one of her own pets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: John Brewster, the oilman from Tulsa, is bringing his new bride to California for their honeymoon. Somehow the Clampetts get the idea that their backyard rustic cabin is the ideal place for the Brewsters to stay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the arrival of spring, the Countess returns for Granny's new batch of spring tonic. Granny thinks she's looking for a new husband and that Jed is her perfect match.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale owns a building that houses a beatnik's club. He hopes to get rid of them when they can't pay their rent but they find a new a sponsor: Jed Clampett.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed soon regrets helping out the beatniks with their money problems when Jethro, Elly May (and even Granny!) decide to join them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is appalled to learn that Jed is going door-to-door peddling his services as a handyman. But then he's apoplectic when he discovers that Jed has been hired by a rival bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A long time employee of the Commerce Bank is being forcibly retired to make way for a new computer system. A chance meeting with the Clampetts gives him an idea about dealing with Mr. Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Beauregard Short arrives in Beverly Hills from back home. Everyone assumes he's looking for a wife and Jethro decides to show him how to be like him, an international playboy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Brewster, the oil man who made Jed a multi-millionaire, arrives in Beverly Hills with his wife planning to build their dream house. Jed and Granny think they have the perfect house in mind for their dream home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is determined to go back home even if she has to walk back all by herself. When she reaches Las Vegas she has second thoughts. Jethro gets arrested by an undercover cop.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she has a new way of getting rid of the Clampetts: talk Jed into donating their mansion to the city for an art museum. They agree, on the assumption that they are supposed to provide the artworks and not move out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny confuses Mrs. Drysdale's forays into astrology with the practice of black magic. An intended gift for Ellie Mae from Mr. Drysdale only adds to the confusion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is anxious to become a new "Double Naught" spy and Mr. Drysdale gives him his own office. A bank robber hopes to con an unwitting Jethro into helping him get into the bank vault.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampetts decide they want to go home for Possum Day, Mr. Drysdale attempts to put together a Possum Day in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks the Drysdale's young attractive maid is interested in him. He commences to courting her but she is actually interested in watching the football game on the Clampett's color TV.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's concocts a love potion for Elly Mae at the same time Mr. Drysdale hires an escort for Elly. Dean arrives at the mansion with the Clampetts believing he's Miss Jane's boyfriend so Granny tries a reverse spell.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E028) Kelly and Brenda fight over the lead role in the school play. Andrea is rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E029) Vicious rumors spread when Brenda gets the lead role in the school play. Steve and Brenda prevent a suicide.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E030) Brandon fears he will lose his chance to go to Washington. Kelly and Dylan break up. Andrea goes into labor.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S04E031) Brandon goes to Washington D.C. and Kelly decides to surprise him by showing up later. Donna worries about David spending time with another girl.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E001) After enjoying a successful summer in London, Brenda decides to stay in England and pursue her stage career.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E002) Brandon and Kelly continue to hide their relationship from Dylan, but the truth is always bound to come out somehow.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E003) Brandon's decision to run for student government proves to be fatal for one California University sophomore.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E004) Brandon wins the election, but Josh's death hangs heavy on him. Alex tells Brandon he's contesting the election, using Josh's death as leverage to unseat Brandon.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E005) Where there's smoke, there's fire, in Kelly's opinion... at least where Valerie is concerned.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E006) The President of Selanesia visits California University to receive cancer treatment.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E007) When the fire marshal shuts down the After Dark for violating capacity, Steve suggests purchasing the space next door.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E008) Dylan's desperation becomes obvious to all when he takes out his gun and shoots up his living room.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E009) Dylan's closest friends stage an intervention at Casa Walsh, where they beg him to enter rehab.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E010) As Dylan lies in a coma fighting for his life, he experiences a number of bizarre dreams involving Erica, his drug dealer, and his dead father.

programme.title: Undisputed
programme.desc: When the world's heavyweight champion is sent to prison, everything points to an inevitable showdown with the penitentiary's undefeated champ. But to make sure the meeting will happen, a former mob boss must call in favors from the outside world.

programme.title: Four Brothers

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS queda conmocionado cuando descubre la cabeza cortada de un marine en un desguace ilegal de automóviles regentado por marines.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la misteriosa explosión de una ambulancia que supuestamente transporta los restos de un marine fallecido en un accidente de tráfico.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Dentro y fuera
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un líder de pandilla, Danny y Baez descubren que el presunto asesino es un ex convicto que tiene una relación romántica con su oficial de libertad condicional, quien podría estar ayudando a encubrir el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Almas perdidas
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un conductor ebrio que mató a una madre y su hijo, Danny y Baez se debaten entre cumplir con su deber y buscar justicia al descubrir la conexión entre el sospechoso y la víctima.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo trata de encontrar una vínculo común entre cuatro hombres desaparecidos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a Miami para localizar a un delincuente que asesina a trabajadoras sexuales en un estilo similar a la matanza de animales.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los cadáveres quemados de varios indigentes cerca del muelle de Santa Mónica en California.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo tienen que intervenir un fin de semana cuando un teniente comandante de la Marina encargado de un cargamento de armas nucleares es aparentemente secuestrado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando las esposas de dos marines son asesinadas, Gibbs y el equipo son llamados para investigar. Gibbs y el equipo temen que los asesinatos tengan una motivación racial, ya que las dos mujeres son asiáticas.

programme.desc: El 20 de Mayo del 2001, Carrie Nelson fue golpeado hasta su muerte mientras trabajaba en unas oficinas comerciales. El caso quedó sin resolver durante seis años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El conductor dijo que no podía haber sido él quien atropelló a un peatón y se fugó en la calle Harrisburg. El Jeep Grand Cherokee que él estaba arrendando en ese entonces había sido vendido meses atrás a otro comprador en otro estado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de seis años corrió y se escondió cuando vio que su abuela era golpeada hasta causarle la muerte, pero el hombre la siguió, la golpeó y la agredió. Ella dijo que el agresor era su tío, quien fue condenado. Se retractó de su testimonio años después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Ahogamiento seco
programme.desc: Cuando Genell Plude es encontrada muerta en su baño, la escena apunta a un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer quien se ha conocido por sufrir de depresión aparentemente se quitó su propia vida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2007, el trailer de Effie y Michael Ratley en Florida se incendia y Michael heroicamente rescata a su esposa e hijo. Un mes después, su esposa es encontrada golpeada hasta la muerte en una habitación de la casa de sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Darrell North, un gerente de construcción, fue encontrado muerto en su tráiler del trabajo en Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En un tranquilo pueblo de Gran Bretaña, un granjero se encuentra con una apariencia escalofriante. Empalado en el poste de la cerca hay una cabeza de cordero cortada y una nota que dice: Usted es el próximo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fantasma en la máquina
programme.desc: Se investiga la aparente sobredosis y suicidio de la esposa del reverendo Bill Guthrie, Sharon, y los detectives recuperan archivos incriminatorios de la computadora de Bill y se enteran de su infidelidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la policía encuentra el cuerpo de Krista Harrison, de 11 años, hay pocas pistas sobre la identidad del asesino. Pero las autoridades están intrigadas por las inusuales fibras naranjas incrustadas en la ropa que se encuentran cerca de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el Molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de Elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, cuando Steven Fortin ataca a la Oficial de Policía Estatal de Maine fuera de su hora servicio, Vicky Gardner, durante una parada rutinaria, se desencadena una serie de eventos que reinician de golpe un caso de asesinato estancado en New Jersey.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen era especialmente violenta: un esposo y una esposa fueron asesinados a tiros en su habitación. ¿Fue cómplice su hija de 16 años?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas reveladoras
programme.desc: La desaparición de la atleta universitaria de Filadelfia, Aimee Willard, es investigada después de que su carro fuera encontrado al costado de la carretera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Kathy Augustine, una política de Nevada, murió misteriosamente durante una campaña de reelección. El médico forense no pudo aislar la causa de la muerte ni explicar las pequeñas heridas punzantes descubiertas durante la autopsia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un millonario y su familia fueron ejecutados en su propio hogar. Durante tres años, los crímenes quedaron sin resolverse. Finalmente, una caja de 30 años de municiones y unas fibras fluorescentes revelan la traición final.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Aceitoso en la mañana
programme.desc: Cuando la policía recuperó el automóvil sumergido de un hombre al que se denunció su desaparición, esperaban encontrar su cuerpo, pero no estaba allí.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Double Shot at Love with DJ Pauly D & Vinny

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate to win Jane back, Spinner sneaks into the Leadership Convention Jane is speaking at and proposes. When Jane turns him down, Spinner breaks up with her – nothing he does is ever good enough.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s the star of Degrassi’s first-ever football game win! The Shep is floored at how much Riley’s improved.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare stands up for Connor when he receives unfair treatment from The Shep. The result of their peaceful protest? Detentions for everyone. No one is more frustrated by the detention than Alli. It wasn’t her idea to protest.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Shep has returned after his sensitivity training and it’s Spirit Week at Degrassi! However spirits are anything but high at home for Jane as she struggles to get her dropout brother Lucas off the couch.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane admits to herself that her issues with her dad go deeper than the divorce – she thinks maybe he did things to her. Jane is very confused and feels alone. Lucas gives Jane a hard time for creating tension between mom and dad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s tired of being referred to as Kelly’s girlfriend and Blonde Emma – she’s not even blonde anymore! Determined to create a distinct university identity, Emma borrows some pot that was gifted to Kelly and smokes up with Becca and Gwyneth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli wants Johnny to like her, a lot. She worries she’s going to lose him to an older more “experienced” girl so to make sure she keeps her man close, Alli decides to play with the big kids at a ravine party.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Stress is at an all-time high at Degrassi with exams approaching and course selections due for next term.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Blue asks Holly J to the winter dance in a very romantic way. Only problem? Holly J thinks she might have a thing for her co-worker, Spinner. While Blue is a dreamboat, Spinner is a goofball.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Mia is offered a MAJOR modeling contract in Paris, Peter decides he’ll go with her. But he soon realizes he doesn’t fit into her sophisticated world.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Peter discovers his recreational drug was not-so-recreational meth, he swears he’ll never touch the stuff again. But with the reality of coming down, Peter realizes he just wants more.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Club Fair Day and Alli and Clare sign up for the Photography Club. Watch out Annie Leibovitz! Everyone who’s anyone is getting involved in something – except Johnny.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Spinner have been through so much together. They’re best friends. Jane’s just come out of a difficult year at home, so hanging out with Spinner is safe and… easy. That’s not a bad thing, right?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli insists she’s done with Johnny. When she breaks into his locker to steal nude photos of herself back, she, in fact, realizes that she’s so not over him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Holly J team up for a practicum business assignment and immediately bond over their idea to start a babysitting agency.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: News travels fast about Riley and Sam’s big fight. Riley doesn’t think much of it – until rumours start spreading that Sam was gay-bashed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Matchmaker week at Degrassi and Declan’s not interested in a serious relationship. The Diplomat brat is here for a good time, not a long time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Against all odds, Holly J has fallen for Declan. Suddenly she gets what everyone’s been so excited about for so long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s living the high school dream. The basketball team made it to the provincial finals, the Sports Awards Gala is coming up, and he finally has a mentor who gets him – Coach Carson.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: KC’s life is on the fast track. With the final basketball game approaching, the pressure is at an all-time high and Coach Carson has really taken KC under his wing.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring a dinosaur graveyard in Patagonia to gain a better understanding of dinosaur evolution, particularly the Middle Jurassic period when they became gigantic.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog fails the doggy day-care entrance exam; three Jack Russell terriers fight one another for their owner's attention; a beagle howls incessantly while on walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A mail carrier learns to thwart dog attacks; two Pomeranians attack each other when left alone; a Swiss mountain dog is aggressive around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles; four French bulldogs do not listen to their owner; a mixed breed has a leash tied so tightly it has to be surgically removed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Milan is called in to help singer Patti LaBelle who is afraid of her own guard dog and a teacher who wants to unify her dog's dual personalities.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback mix has eccentricities; a Jack Russell terrier attacks motorcycles; a border collie's herding instincts get the best of him.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd is too dedicated to its owner; a beagle mix lashes out at anyone who walks past; an Italian mastiff fears cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A puppy terrorizes its owner's cat; a spoiled Yorkshire terrier; a Rottweiler is aggressive toward strangers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A golden retriever mix with canine aggression; a bearded collie who barks, howls and scratches at her owner's boyfriend's guitar; a Lhasa apso/Cavalier Kind Charles Spaniel with canine aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore peace at an apartment complex where the residents' dogs do not get along; a family has trouble controlling its three dogs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But, unfortunately, they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But, Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.desc: Seven exceptional warriors band together to protect a village from bounty hunters.

programme.desc: In this visually stunning wuxia tale, a skilled swordsman seeks redemption from his violent past by living as a vagrant, but must confront his demons when chaos disrupts his quest for peace.

programme.title: Eye For An Eye: The Blind Swordsman
programme.desc: After being caught in the middle of a power struggle that results in the assassination of an innocent woman, a highly trained and exceptionally deadly swordsman seeks justice—and revenge.

programme.title: Baby Assassins
programme.desc: Chisato and Mahilo are two high school girls who are about to graduate. They also happen to both be highly skilled assassins. When the organization they work for orders them to share a room, the relationship between turns sour.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The Rangers visit Rose's college in London to try to get the parchment deciphered, only to lose it to Tyzonn, Moltor's latest alien lizard henchman.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Mack joins forces with Tyzonn, learning that the reptilian creature is actually a human from the planet Mercury, cursed by Moltor.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The search for the next jewel leads the Rangers to Portugal, then to Brazil, with a new group of villains, the Fearcats, always one step ahead of them!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: It's up to Mr Hartford to restore the liquidized Tyzonn to his human form. But even then, will the man from Mercury join the team, or will his past with an ill-fated Intergalactic Emergency Response crew keep him from it?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Jessica Jeffries, an old college pal of Mr Hartford's turned big time news reporter, snags an exclusive interview with the Rangers for her show, "Good Morning, San Angeles."

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Will attempts to teach Tyzonn how to blend in on Earth, but when the Mercurian starts to copy Will a little too closely, the pair clash.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: With the Cannon of Ki Amuk and Mjolnir in their possession, the Rangers track the next clue to Mexico. There, the team has to contend with Kamdor & Miratrix, Flurious with his Chillers, and even Moltor and his Lava Lizards!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Having swiped the Paedra Aztec Del Compass from the Rangers, Moltor puts it in the possession of his old friend Blothgaar, the next clue to a jewel of the Corona Aurora.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Using the compass, the Rangers finally find the 3rd Jewel of the Corona Aurora. Will is entrusted to get it back to the base, but is ambushed by Kamdor & Miratrix, and loses it to the villainous pair.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The son of Lord Zedd and Rita Repulsa, Thrax, unites all four Corona Aurora-seeking factions of villains into a new Evil Alliance.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: No longer having Ranger powers, the former Overdrive Rangers return to their civilian lives. All but Mack, who learns of Thrax's plans to destroy Sentinel Knight, and seeks out the only item capable of doing so, the legendary sword Excelsior.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The Rangers get a day off, and plan a relaxing picnic in the forest. Unfortunately for Rose, Tyzonn is obsessed with getting to know her better, which goes from flattery to annoyance very quickly.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Ronny runs into a stubborn obstacle named Will while trying to throw a Halloween party. When she is captured to power Moltor and the Fearcats's latest weapon, can Will steal her back?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Norg and Will strike a strange alliance in their attempt to find the Fearcats' secret hideout. The equally strange alliance between Moltor, Mig and Benglo appears to be leading to the defeat of the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: While battling one of Kamdor's monsters, the Rangers get their computer systems infected with a virus. This exposes the deep secret of Mack's true nature to the Red Ranger, as he learns everything he ever knew was a lie!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: After learning about his true robotic nature, Mack starts to go through an identity crisis. When the Rangers battle Crazar, a Fearcat from Tyzonn's past, the Mercurian reveals unexpected things.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Mig and Benglo use the power of the Octavian Chalice, and unleash the mighty Agrios, a giant robotic creature that proves to be stronger than all the Rangers' Zords!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: While the other Rangers continue to be outmatched by the Fearcats and Agrios, Tyzonn begins to accept his fiance Vella's claims that he was never a Power Ranger.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Using Mack's internal CPU to replay highlights from their Ranger careers, the team take the time to refresh their memories as to who has the Corona Aurora jewel.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Using the Octavian Chalice, the Rangers journey to Greece in an attempt to find the next jewel via an ancient ritual. But Kamdor and Miratrix interrupt the ceremony, making their ultimate stand against their enemies!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The Rangers return to Egypt, then travel to Japan, and back again, all in their heated quest to find the key to unlock the last hidden jewel. But despite the ground covered, is it actually closer to home than they realize?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: With the ultimate power of the completed Corona Aurora at his disposal, Flurious freezes all of San Angeles and prepares to conquer the world in his new form. The Rangers must use their powersl to make their final stand against him.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Theo, Lily, and Casey, members of the secretive kung fu academy Pai Zhuq (Order of the Claw), are chosen ones to become the latest guardians of the ancient imprisoned spirit, Dai Shi.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: With Mantor still plaguing the city, the Rangers are in desperate need of learning the ability to bring themselves up to his size. RJ refuses to teach his new pizza parlor employees/students this skill, until they can master individual weapons.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The second Finger of Poison, Gakko, uses his wall-sticking skills to humiliate the Rangers when they try to face him on his own turf.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The heavily armored Pangolin proves to be too tough of a nut for the Rangers to crack. Their only hope is a powerful weapon called the Jungle Mace, which lies in the hands of retired Pai Zhuq teacher, Master Phant.

programme.desc: A look back on the highlights, low-lights, and previously unseen footage from the first nine episodes as we race toward the climactic grand finale! Presented by VH1.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The last 3 queens face their final challenge acting in a scene with RuPaul and shooting the music video for his next single "Jealous of My Boogie". Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Fire Island
programme.desc: Six friends travel to Fire Island to have the summer adventure of a lifetime. The boys explore the island, attend the Pines Party, and then tensions flare when an afternoon pool party goes off the rails.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Princess calls Teairra on her false friendship. Willie tries to get out of his contract. Nikki and Brandi confront Jason and Kamiah. Miles invites Amber to sit down with a therapist.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Miles tells the truth to Amber and his family. Max and Brandi resolve their ring issues. Nia has had enough with Soulja's wandering eye. Teairra confronts Ray about his betrayal and considers surgical solutions to her personal problem.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Fizz reaches out to get some help raising his son. When Amber learns that Miles is with Milan, she wants to confront him about it. Hazel has an accident. Nia defends her relationship with Soulja to her father.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Willie tries to get out of his contract but Shanda takes matters into her own hands. Rich tries to play peacemaker between Moniece and her mother. Teairra goes in for surgery and Nikki worries if she'll be ready for their fashion show.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Willie finds out Shanda's been dancing again. Teairra looks like she won't be ready to walk the runway. Fizz wants to talk to Rich about his involvement in his family. Apryl asks Omarion about getting a turn in the spotlight.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Teairra stuns Nikki and Princess at the big fashion show. Moniece makes a big confession to Fizz. Ray J tries to get Princess back.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Rich confronts Moniece about her feelings for Fizz. Ray J has a surprise for Princess. Miles introduces Milan to his family and gets a mixed welcome. Moniece has choice words for Nikki after she spills the beans to Rich about Fizz. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Ray and Princess take the next steps toward their nuptials. Moniece and Brandi handle some unfinished business. Shanda and Willie's fairytale marriage hits a major snag. Fizz tries to persuade Nikki to move forward in the relationship.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Shanda and Willie's marriage is rocked by a woman from Willie's past. Ray and Princess tackle the prenup controversy. Masika struggles to deal with paternity issues. Moniece stirs up trouble with Princess when she publicly spills tea about Ray.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: A1 and Lyrica seemingly have the perfect relationship, but their opinionated mothers threaten the status quo. Princess confronts Moniece over her social media posts. Brandi tries to keep her secret from Max, but her plan blows up in her face.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: A1 and Lyrica struggle to get their moms to make nice before they tie the knot. Masika meets up with Fetty Wap. Max is still furious with Brandi after discovering her secret. New love is in the air for Nikki, and things are already becoming complicated.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Nikki is having difficulties juggling relationships with Safaree and Rosa. Tired of all the family drama, A1 and Lyrica finally take matters into their own hands. After Shanda is confronted by Willie's mistress, she decides enough is enough.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Things take a turn when Safaree catches Nikki in the act. Brandi and Max's rocky marriage is tested further when Max begins working with Masika. Princess has her hands full with wedding planning, but where is Ray?

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: A1 and Lyrica throw a housewarming party. Lyrica's mother learns some shocking news. Ray's business is booming, but it's frustrating Princess who is in the middle of wedding planning. Nikki and Rosa have an awkward moment. Teairra deals with legal issues.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: In India, Ravi the baby lion-tailed macaque faces life in a shrinking habitat and encroaching human world; Ravi has a caring mom, a protective dad, a playful sister and numerous, cousins, aunts and uncles all watching over him.

programme.title: Babies of the plains
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Chasing the Rains
programme.desc: In Samburu, matriarch Anastasia turns her elephant herd north after a local river dries up; cheetah mom Kuleta evades a crafty pack of hyenas in Naboisho; checking in on wild dog Phoenix and her new litter in Laikipia.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: The large Manzi pack in the lush heartland, the Kakuli pack in the badlands and the tiny Stork colony pack living at the park's edge; Julz shares their victories and defeats.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: As the temperatures rise, the water is getting scarce; the Manzi pack must stand alongside predators to hydrate at a remaining precious water spot; Weka's pack feed the pups; the Stork colony thrive against all odds.

programme.title: Bears of the Karawank Mountains
programme.desc: Travelling across Slovenia's Alpine peaks.

programme.title: Webs & Wings: Nature's Tiny Ballet
programme.desc: Unlock the vital role these feared hunters and spinners play in Earth's ecology.

programme.title: Croc and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve gets a first-hand look at what makes Nile crocodiles so deadly and helps a team of scientists relocate a bunch of man-eaters.

programme.title: The Magic Circle of the Reef
programme.desc: The Coral Triangle reef is part of the so-called Ring of Fire, a 40,000 km volcanic belt that surrounds the land perimeter of the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Discover how scientists are working to restore and protect the Galapagos; witness penguin health checks, tortoise tagging and battles against invasive species, which are building a sustainable future for this delicate, one-of-a-kind ecosystem.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Bidding farewell to old friends and celebrating Molly and Bumi's big move.

programme.title: Croc and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve gets a first-hand look at what makes Nile crocodiles so deadly and helps a team of scientists relocate a bunch of man-eaters.

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Following four families of four different species - the resourceful Beach Troop, the warlike Desert Troop, the disciplined River Troop, and the peaceful Mountain Band -- to find out why these primates are among the most successful animals in Africa.

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: The love rivalry shakes every fiber of the body as hormones invade the blood, and some of the most overwhelming spectacles on the planet are produced; the language of love and the fight for reproduction stimulate the most diverse behaviors.

programme.title: The Magic Circle of the Reef
programme.desc: Pelagic beings live in the so-called reef water column, the zone between the seabed and the surface. They are species that travel the sea placidly, feeding when they are hungry and swimming slowly throughout their lives.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Massive riches have been hidden inside Tsukikage Castle. Lupin and his gang must decipher a code to find out the whereabouts of this great treasure. Wii Lupin be able to locate the treasure before his rivals do?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen head to Mongolia in search of Genghis Khan's treasures. Meanwhile, Goemon is visiting his ancestor's grave to pay his respects when he encounters Fujiko, who is in search of Yoshitsune Minamoto's buried treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO chief promises to erase Fujiko's criminal record in exchange for her cooperation in arresting Lupin. Up against an ego-bruised Inspector Zenigata and a determined Fujiko, have Lupin's heisting days come to an end?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen sneak on board a ship smuggling diamonds. However, what they find on board are several thousand chickens! Lupin and his gang infiltrate the Hong Kong smuggling boss's lair where diamonds are being illicitly sold…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal a suitcase containing Costa Rican diamonds, but the contents turns out to be Inspector Zenigata. The real diamonds are being shipped to Puerto Rico inside a missile and Lupin must find out the precise launch time to intercept it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Kaguya, a beautiful woman, separately asks Lupin, Jigen and Goemon to gather the tears of the Yeti, a mermaid's scale, and the liver of a dragon so she can make a secret potion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A wealthy shipping magnate and also a bachelor, Onabes' final voyage is nothing short of extravagant, with a ship full of beautiful women and fine art. Things go as planned when Lupin infiltrates the ship disguised as a woman…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Hong Kong for a vacation when he is asked to find a woman in return for helping him escape from Inspector Zenigata. Lupin discovers the pickpocket who stole his wallet is the daughter of the woman he is looking for…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Sleeping Lion, a statue made of solid gold, is being transported to a museum by a specially armored, airtight car. Lupin steals the armored car together with the statue and nearly asphyxiated Inspector Zenigata inside.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal crime boss Mulligan's precious jewels, only have them stolen from him by Fujiko! Mulligan, unaware that Fujiko has his jewels, hires a skilled gunman named Hangman to take them back from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has been put on auction at the Wanted Club and Dr. Mad places the winning bid. Dr. Mad also purchases Fujiko and Jigen from the auctions. The three are abandoned on a deserted island with killer cyborgs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has his eyes on the royal family's Imperial State Crown, but thanks to Scotland Yard's Inspector Dover, stealing it won't be easy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin announces he's going to steal the betting takes at the Kentucky Derby, but the heist fails. However, it's all part of the plan. Lupin's main target is really the Metropolitan Bank's underground vault.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After several divorces and a couple of deceased husbands, Jacqueline has amassed a fortune and a collection of impressive jewels. In a twist of fate, Lupin and Jacqueline become close... Too close for Jigen and Goemon's comfort…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An illicit auction selling smuggled treasures is taking place. Lupin targets the auction. In the process, Lupin discovers the auctioneer is Cornelia, the woman he once loved who died saving his life…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is reunited with Cornelia, a woman who died by her father's hands to save Lupin's life. However, Cornelia's memories of Lupin have been erased. Her father is Dr. Zel, a Nazi who has succeeded in resurrecting corpses and controlling them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko discovers that the Holy Scripture for Immortality is hidden within the jungles of Thailand. However, Emmanuelle Poirot, a cold-hearted beauty, is after them too.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Phantoma Mark III, grandson of the mysterious master thief and disguise artist Phantoma, who terrorized Europe during his heyday, is plotting to take over the world…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The aging Inspector Hanshichi Mikawa, who failed to capture Lupin 10 years ago, is viewed as a nuisance by his peers at the downtown police station. Lupin has announced he'll be stealing the golden Kannon statuette.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have stolen the "36 Views of Mt. Fuji," a famous series of 46 woodblock prints, from the exhibition hall. However, a gang calling itself the Shiranami Five challenges Lupin head-on by stealing one of the prints from him.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Goemon, siding with the Shiranami Five, challenges Lupin to a one-on-one duel. While Goemon keeps Lupin busy, the Shiranami Five steals the 36 Views, but one of its members, Kikuko Benten, betrays her gang and escapes with the loot.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a wild whim, Inspector Zenigata swipes a throwing coin owned by his great Edo-era ancestor, Heiji Zenigata while he's viewing the inside of an incredible new safe protected by Professor Hunter's super computer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are after the Aurora Droplet, a diamond adorning a prima ballerina's tiara. During the heist, Jigen is wounded and in a twist of fate, is saved by Monica, the prima ballerina.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After shaking off Inspector Zenigata's pursuit, Lupin is stopped by a monstrously huge Fujiko on his way home! The giant Fujiko turns out to be an illusion created by Madame X. Lupin learns Madame X's hobby is collecting famous people.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Bandit leader Basara is determined to sniff out the location of the diamonds Lupin has hidden somewhere in India. Armed with his sinister invention, the Suicide Ray Gun, he tries to make Lupin talk, even trying his luck with a fake Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Trouble is all but guaranteed when a crime boss and an arms merchant join hands. The two set their eyes on Goemen's sword, which can split a tank in half! After hiring Fujiko to steal it, they transform the sword into an invincible flying weapon of war.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen and Gomen have sent a letter saying they are being held captive in a small but terrifying village. Lupin arrives in the village to rescue them, but Jigen and Goemon are acting oddly.

programme.title: Siesta Key
programme.desc: Juliette learns Alyssa took Alex back, while Alyssa finds out she's pregnant. Amanda and JJ argue over trust issues. Brandon reintroduces Camilla to the group, while Jared leaves his girlfriend alone with them.

programme.title: Siesta Key

programme.title: Siesta Key

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.desc: Phelps poses as the head of a Hollywood movie studio as part of the IMF plan to prevent a crime syndicate's takeover of the studio.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows viewers a kitten named Jimmy and a film of Jimmy's birth, and assures viewers that "it's all right to wonder about things." Then, poet and essayist May Sarton visits.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers invites viewers along on a visit to a special new playground designed and built by both adults and children. He makes up a song at the piano.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy factory where people make plastic molded tricycles, and he receives a visit from folk singer Ella Jenkins who collects toy tops from around the world.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers flies a balsa wood airplane, and Mr. McFeely visits an airport control tower. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday discovers that learning to ride a bike isn't always easy!

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how empty containers plus some imagination can create a whole Neighborhood. In Make-Believe, Ana Platypus is jealous of Prince Tuesday's new bike and angry because her parents aren't buying one for her.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a raincoat and talks about things to do inside. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Aberlin dances in the rain. X flies to slide down a rainbow. Daniel wants to learn Tai Chi to stop his scary dreams.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers hangs a fish mobile, then goes to see some killer whales swim and play. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine teaches dance and says males weren't invited to the studio because they don't dance.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sam Weber and sees him dance. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday XIII goes to Lady Elaine's dance school, and she turns him away claiming that men can't dance. Sam Weber arrives and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps to weave a scarf. Henrietta Pussycat's ballet teacher, Miss Cloud, does not speak but communicates with movement. The Junior Tamburitzans perform two folk dances. Mister Rogers talks about making up stories and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
